positive: Minimalist geometric constellation map design. Depict a stylized, abstract cosmic scene with interconnected lines forming constellations. The primary elements should be crisp, white neon lines against a deep indigo or matte black background. Include abstract celestial motifs like stylized moons, planets, and nebulae rendered as soft gradients or simple solid shapes. Composition must be centered and balanced for print. Utilize flat design principles, strong contrasts, and clean, wearable aesthetics. Vector art quality, perfect symmetry, ethereal glow effect, 4K print detail.
